## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New endpoint / feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed endpoints follow the positional-arg convention and are faithful
      to the real client (argument order, field names, enum values)
- [ ] Added/updated tests under `tests/`
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/`, `docs/ENDPOINTS.md`) if relevant
- [ ] No secrets, tokens or personal data committed
